name: get_board_parts
short_description: Get the list of board_part available in the project
full_help:
get_board_parts

Description: 
Get the list of board_part available in the project

Syntax: 
get_board_parts  [-regexp] [-nocase] [-latest_file_version]
                 [-latest_hw_revision] [-filter <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]
                 [<patterns>...]

Returns: 
list of board_part objects

Usage: 
  Name                    Description
  -----------------------------------
  [-regexp]               Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]               Perform case-insensitive matching
  [-latest_file_version]  Show only latest board parts by file version
  [-latest_hw_revision]   Show only latest board parts by board revision
  [-filter]               Filter list with expression
  [-quiet]                Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]              Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]            Match Board Part names against patterns
                          Default: *
                          Values: The default search pattern is the wildcard 
                          *, or .* when -regexp is specified.

Categories: 
Object, Project, XPS, Board

arguments.description: Show only latest board parts by file version
Show only latest board parts by board revision
Suspend message limits during command execution
